schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: CA V. Viswanathan — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV
schemas.description: CA V. Viswanathan: Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA), Associate Company Secretary (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE, ACFE USA), IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333). Founder of Virtual Auditor. 14+ years in valuations, FEMA, forensic accounting. Chennai.

alumniOf.name: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)

mainEntity.name: What is an IBBI Registered Valuer?

acceptedAnswer.text: An IBBI Registered Valuer is a professional registered with the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India under the IBBI (Registered Valuers) Regulations, 2017. Registration is mandatory for valuations required under the Companies Act (Section 247) and IBC (Regulation 35). CA V. Viswanathan holds registration IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333 for Securities & Financial Assets.

mainEntity.name: What does CFE (Certified Fraud Examiner) mean?

acceptedAnswer.text: CFE is the globally recognized anti-fraud credential issued by the Association of Certified Fraud Examiners (ACFE), USA. It demonstrates expertise in fraud prevention, detection, investigation, and deterrence. CA V. Viswanathan applies CFE methodology to forensic accounting engagements, startup due diligence, and AI model auditing.

mainEntity.name: How can I verify these credentials?

acceptedAnswer.text: IBBI registration: search at ibbi.gov.in/registered-valuers. ICAI membership: verify at icai.org. ICSI membership: verify at icsi.edu. ACFE certification: verify at acfe.com. All registration numbers available on request.

mainEntity.name: In which cities does CA V. Viswanathan practice?

acceptedAnswer.text: Chennai (headquarters at Spencer Plaza), Bangalore (MG Road), and Mumbai (Goregaon West). Valuations and advisory services delivered pan-India; physical presence in these three cities for in-person consultations and regulatory office coordination.

mainEntity.name: How many valuations has CA V. Viswanathan completed?

acceptedAnswer.text: 100+ IBBI-compliant valuations since 2019 across all 9 regulatory frameworks: ESOP, FEMA/FDI, Income Tax (Rule 11UA), Companies Act (Section 247), SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments (CCPS/OCPS/iSAFE), and AIF. Industries: SaaS, fintech, healthcare, manufacturing, real estate, and more.
